sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110955" key="filetai/reios2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλεταίρ-ειος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μήν</foreign>), name of a month at Pergamon, prob. in <sense id="n110955.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Yale Classical Studies</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.205</biblScope> </bibl>:</sense> </entryFree>
